beat1.headline: Myusik bin olweiz da samting we bring stranjas tugeda
beat1.subtext3: Akros ol langgwij yu neba bin tok
beat2.text: Dis bit kros ebritaim bounda. Dis wod neba bin kud.
beat4.prefix: Fas taim ina dis wol fo komershal dans trak
beat4.headline: Wan trak. 50 langgwij. 5.8 bilyan vois.
geo.suggestion: Yu wandi luk dis said langa {{language}}?
geo.pickSubtitle: Pik yu gud langgwij fo go on
